title: On Sharing Vulnerability
summary: One of the most wonderful things I've seen on the internet in recent years is our growing willingness to be vulnerable, together. I have to admit that this wasn't really a 'thing' for me until I'd read Daring Greatly by Brene Brown[^1], as well as Rising Strong[^2]. As far as sel
